    Who We Are

    Our Mission

    GRACE (Greater Roslyn Association for Chinese Enrichment) is a non-profit organization dedicated to serve and support the Chinese American families in Roslyn. We strive to promote cultural awareness and improve diversity inclusion within the community. By facilitating our constituent's  involvement through education and community service we aim to enhance the lives of Chinese families and the communities around us.  The organization serves as a liaison between the township, the school district and Chinese families to assimilate and empower the broader Roslyn community.

    Our Core Values

    Making A Difference

    Empowering the Next Generation
    Cultivate youth leadership through community involvement and support academic success for grades K–12 through public workshops, mentorship, and family-focused educational initiatives.

    Building Stronger Communities
    We partner with small business owners and professionals to strengthen local prosperity while fostering meaningful connections between Chinese families and the greater Roslyn community.

    Preserving Culture & Promoting Understanding
    We celebrate Chinese heritage through cultural programs and community events that educate future generations and promote cross-cultural awareness and appreciation.

    Supporting Families
    We provide guidance and resources to help Chinese families integrate into the Greater Roslyn community, including connecting special needs families with vital local services and support networks.

    Civic Engagement & Advocacy
    We encourage active participation within the community by strengthening public relationships, amplifying community voices, and serving as a bridge between families, schools, and local government.

    ©2019 by Greater Roslyn Association for Chinese Enrichment.
